label: Hero Asset
description: High-fidelity, scroll-stopping lifestyle visuals. Mission: Aspiration & Attention.
templateRules: Editorial lifestyle photograph. The product is ambient — part of the scene, never the hero subject. Shot feels like a real captured moment, not a staged ad. Wide enough to show the full environment and mood.

label: Contextual Asset
description: Lifestyle shots, in-use scenarios. Mission: Believability & Trust.
templateRules: Candid, believable lifestyle photograph. The product is in natural use — being carried, worn, or used as part of daily life. Mid-distance shot. The person or setting is as important as the product.

label: Functional Asset
description: Product shots, close-ups, texture detail. Mission: Clarity & Detail.
templateRules: Clean product or texture photograph. The product IS the subject. Sharp focus on the product details, fabric, and embroidery. Simple, uncluttered background. Macro detail where relevant.
